name: agent-watcher
description: Real-time monitoring and visualization dashboard for Claude Code sessions
author: develinu <iwlee.dev@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w tui
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
